creator: holger_baumhaus@yahoo.com
text:
I have the same problem with a Adaptec AHA 2940 UW aic
7880.

MB: Gigabyte 2000 Intel BX, P II 400. I waited a few
minutes and still no response or message.

FreeBSD <= 4.3 worked fine on the same hardware, so
does Debian Linux.
Also after an system update from 4.3 to 4.4 and using
the generic kernel hangs the system.
